items.title: Anupam Rasayan Q3 net profit rises 12% on higher revenue
items.description: Anupam Rasayan India reported a 12% increase in net profit to Rs 61 crore for Q3 FY26, driven by a 31.35% rise in total revenue to Rs 512.44 crore. The company also announced a significant strategic development with the agreement to acquire US-based Jayhawk Fine Chemicals Corporation, strengthening its global presence and custom synthesis capabilities.

items.title: GMR Airports Q3 net profit falls to Rs 174 crore
items.description: GMR Airports Ltd. reported a 14% decline in consolidated profit after tax to Rs 173.96 crore for the December 2025 quarter, impacted by Rs 183.12 crore in one-time expenses. These included costs related to the termination of a pact with Celebi and the new labour laws. Despite this, total income surged to Rs 4,082.77 crore.

items.title: Southern Petrochemicals clock Q3 consolidated PAT at Rs 54.07 cr
items.description: Southern Petrochemicals Industries Corporation Ltd announced a net profit of Rs 54.07 crore for the October-December 2025 quarter. This marks an increase from the previous year's Rs 38.50 crore. For the nine months ending December 31, 2025, net profits reached Rs 182.01 crore. The company's income from operations for the quarter was Rs 778.39 crore.
